title: iQOO Z11 Lite's design revealed ahead of launch, iQOO 16 rumored to skip India
description: iQOO India CEO Nipun Marya teased the launch of a new Z11 series smartphone yesterday, which, he revealed today, is the Z11 Lite. Marya's X post suggests the iQOO Z11 Lite is aimed at students and Gen Z, while a post by iQOO's Indian branch says the smartphone is "Built to keep up," "Powered by AI," and "Made to stand out." Neither X post reveals the specs and features of the iQOO Z11 Lite, but they did reveal the smartphone's design. The Z11 Lite features a vertically aligned camera island on the back, but it's unclear if it houses two cameras or just one. On the right side of the...

title: iOS 27 Beta 3 now available with more tweaks and improvements
description: Apple has released the third developer beta of iOS 27, two weeks after the previous beta. The latest update brings several bug fixes, improvements, and a handful of new features. The iOS 27 Beta 3 update, carrying build number 24A5380h, is now available to developers enrolled in Apple’s Developer Program. It can be downloaded through the Settings app. In the official release notes, Apple has outlined all the bug fixes and the known issues that users may encounter in the latest beta. Alongside these fixes, iOS 27 Beta 3 introduces several new features, including support for a new...

title: Global vivo X500 Pro Max gets certified before launch
description: vivo is expected to launch the X500 family in China in September, and one of the family's members will be the X500 Pro Max. This has now been certified for sale in Indonesia by TKDN with the model number V2610. The model number was previously spotted in the GSM Association’s IMEI database, where it was associated with the X500 Pro Max name. According to past rumors, the vivo X500 Pro Max will have a 6.85-inch flat LIPO OLED display with "2K" resolution and a 144Hz refresh rate, a 50MP main camera using a LOFIC sensor, a 200MP periscope telephoto camera, a 50MP ultrawide camera, and a...

title: iQOO Z11 is on its way to India, probably with different specs
description: The iQOO Z11 seems to finally be on its way to India, according to a new post on X by Nipun Marya, the brand's CEO in the country. The Z11 launched in China in March, and then made it to some other markets in May, but there are quite a few differences between the two versions. Now a tipster over on X says the Indian Z11 won't be the international Z11, so we may in the end be looking at three devices using the same name while having slightly different specs. The tipster in question has revealed the fact that the Indian Z11 has the model number I2514, and a prototype with that exact...

title: vivo Y500 4G is official with an 8,100 mAh battery
description: Following a teaser last month, vivo has now finally made the Y500 4G official in Pakistan and Nepal. The device comes with a 6.83-inch 1260x2800 AMOLED touchscreen with 120Hz refresh rate and 5,000-nit peak brightness. It's powered by the Unisoc T7300 SoC, paired with 8GB of RAM and 128/256GB of storage. On the rear there's a 50MP main camera and a 2MP decorative sensor, and on the front you get a 32MP selfie shooter. The phone has an 8,100 mAh battery which supports 44W fast charging. The Y500 4G is IP68 and IP69 certified for dust and water resistance, and it has an in-display...

title: DCS: Huawei will release a dual and a tri-foldable this year, new wide-foldable next year
description: A few months ago, a relatively unknown tipster on Weibo claimed that the Huawei Mate XT2 will debut in October. Now, the reliable Digital Chat Station has reported that the next-gen triple foldable is coming in the second half of this year – and that it won’t be alone. The new foldables will likely feature the Kirin 9050 Pro chipset that should be introduced with the Mate 90 series. This chipset is said to have a performance comparable to 3nm chips, though it probably won’t be manufactured on a 3nm node. The current best chip from Huawei is the Kirin 9030 and that is made on SMIC’s N+3...

title: This is what Samsung had to sacrifice to make the Galaxy Z Fold8 and Fold8 Ultra crease-free
description: Samsung is expected to introduce the Galaxy Z Fold8 and Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra at an Unpacked event taking place in London on July 22. Ahead of that, today a new rumor from Ice Universe has revealed the tradeoff that the company has made in order to ensure that the new foldable phones are practically crease-free. This feat was achieved by entirely reworking the hinge mechanism for both devices compared to last year’s Galaxy Z Fold7. However, the new hinge inevitably comes with a folding and unfolding action that is described as "more decisive". Samsung Galaxy Z Fold8 (left) and Galaxy Z...

title: Sky will acquire ITV, the combined company will edge out YouTube for second place in the UK
description: Comcast-owned Sky will acquire ITV’s media and entertainment divisions in a £1.6 billion deal. ITV’s broadcast channels and the ITVX streaming service will remain free-to-air. Negotiations started back in November and this is what the two companies agreed on. Sky will pay ITV £1.2 billion in cash and it will transfer Love Productions (which makes The Great British Bake Off among other things). Additionally, Sky will pay £200 million to ITV in 2028, though that is dependent on meeting advertising revenue goals. This acquisition does not include ITV’s studio arm. That said, as part of...

title: Galaxy S27 Pro will use a Snapdragon chip only in select regions, Exynos 2700 everywhere else
description: For a bit, the Samsung Galaxy S27 Pro sounded like a “mini Ultra” with leaks about a Privacy Display feature for its 6.47” screen. We were reminded that this wasn’t the case when it came out that the Pro and Ultra will use different telephoto cameras (but they will have the same main, ultra-wide and selfie cameras). And now here’s another reminder. The Samsung Galaxy S27 Pro will use an Exynos 2700 chipset everywhere outside of North America, reports Korea’s Money Today. China traditionally gets Snapdragon too, but that wasn’t mentioned in the report. The S27 Ultra will use the new...

title: Nothing Ear (3a) leak day before announcement
description: Nothing is set to launch its Phone (4b) tomorrow alongside a new pair of wireless earbuds. The Nothing Ear (3a) are set to arrive as the successor to 2024’s Nothing Ear (a) and WinFuture has now shared our first look at them. Nothing Ear (3a) in yellow Like their predecessor, the Ear (3a) is set to come in flashy colors, including a vibrant yellow hue, which was the hero color of the Ear (a). This time around, Nothing has prepared a new pink hue, which is also quite eye-catching. Nothing Ear (3a) in pink The yellow and pink colors will be joined by more...

title: Samsung DX employees are planning a rally to protest a hundred-fold disparity in bonuses
description: Workers at Samsung’s Device Solutions (the company’s semiconductor arm) were threatening to strike back in May, but their union and the company signed a deal that opened the gates to massive performance bonuses. That is not the end of the story, though, as another union that represents another branch is now unhappy with the bonus disparity. Samsung’s Device Experience (DX) branch builds smartphones, TVs and home appliances. Their union is planning to hold a rally near the Samsung Electronics Suwon plant on July 16. The reason is simple – workers in the non-chip divisions are expected to...

title: Global Redmi Note 17 nabs a certification alongside its Poco-branded twin
description: Redmi is launching the Note 17 series in China this month, but the global models could still be many months away, if history is any indication. Anyway, when they do arrive in other markets, they may be very different compared to their Chinese counterparts, as usually happens. Now BIS has certified a Redmi device with the model number 2607DRA18I and a Poco device with the model number 2607DPC18I, and these may in fact be the exact same phone under two different names - it would definitely not be the first time Redmi and Poco pulled something like that. The Redmi version is rumored to...

title: Samsung confirms the names of the Galaxy Watch9, Galaxy Watch Ultra2, and Galaxy Able
description: Samsung has just confirmed the names of its upcoming wearable devices, expected to be unveiled on July 22 at its next Unpacked event in London. So, we unsurprisingly have the Galaxy Watch9 and the Galaxy Watch Ultra2, but also the Galaxy Able. This is rumored to be Samsung’s first pair of clip-on earbuds, previously thought to launch as the Galaxy Buds Able. Now, the "Buds" in the name has been dropped. They are reportedly going to use bone conduction technology to reproduce sound, unlike the Galaxy Buds which have speakers. All of this information comes from the Galaxy Wearable app,...

title: Could this be the end of OnePlus? EU customers are facing warranty issues
description: An increasing number of EU users are facing warranty issues with OnePlus and are gathering on Reddit to tell their stories. Some are even escalating and filing a case with the European Consumer Center (ECC) for deceptive trade practices and breach of warranty terms. One Reddit post tells a story about a pair of OnePlus Buds 2 that were received as a gift when purchasing the OnePlus 13 almost two years ago. Before the warranty expired, the buds malfunctioned and were sent for repairs at OnePlus. However, OnePlus said the Buds 2 are a near-end-of-life product, so they can't repair or...

title: Here's how much the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold8, Z Flip8 foldables will cost in South Korea
description: Last week, the European pricing for Samsung's upcoming Galaxy Z foldables surfaced online. Now, a new report from South Korea has revealed the expected prices of the Galaxy Z Fold8, Z Fold8 Ultra, and Z Flip8 in the company's home market. According to the report, Samsung's upcoming Galaxy Z foldables will cost KRW 200,000 more than their predecessors. The Galaxy Z Fold8 is tipped to start at around KRW 2,278,000 ($1,499) in South Korea, while the Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra could carry a starting price of KRW 2,577,000 ($1,685). Meanwhile, the Galaxy Z Flip8 is said to start at around...

title: vivo V80 series said to launch next month, specs tipped
description: The vivo V70 debuted earlier this year, and a new leak now suggests the vivo V80 lineup could arrive as soon as next month. The leak also reveals the key specs of one of the upcoming models. According to a tipster on X, the vivo V80 series will be unveiled in mid-August. The standard vivo V80 is tipped to feature a 6.59-inch flat display with a 144Hz refresh rate and 1.5K resolution. vivo V70 The phone is said to retain the Snapdragon 7 Gen 4 chipset from its predecessor but offer a larger 7,200mAh battery that supports 90W fast charging. As for the cameras, the vivo V80 is said...

title: New Redmi Note 17 series leak details vanilla, Pro and Pro Max specs, includes images
description: So, Redmi decided to skip over the Note 16 series and get straight to the 17 series, which will be released later this month. There will be four models according to rumors – Redmi Note 17, 17 Pro, 17 Pro Max and 17R – and we’ve seen leaked specs for two or three of them. Yeah, there is some confusion going on. The Redmi Note 17 is said to have a flat 6.83” 1.5K display and a Snapdragon 6 Gen 5 chipset – or 6s Gen 4, there are conflicting reports. It will have a large 9,000mAh battery with 67W fast charging, plus a 50MP camera. Leaked Redmi Note 17 series image Note that this...

title: Huawei Pura 90 series' global launch date confirmed
description: Following their announcement in China back in April, Huawei has now confirmed that the Pura 90 series is set to launch globally on July 14. The keynote event will be held in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia. This development follows a similar approach to last year’s Pura 80 series global launch, which took place on July 10. Last year, Huawei brought over its Pura 80, Pura 80 Pro and 80 Ultra to the global stage but it remains to be seen if we will get all three Pura 90 models this time around. Pura 90, Pura 90 Pro and Pura 90 Pro Max For more details on the Pura 90 Pro and 90 Pro...

title: Xiaomi 18 Pro Max battery specifications surface
description: The Xiaomi 18 Pro lineup is expected to debut in China this September. Ahead of the rumored launch, a new leak has revealed the battery details of the flagship Xiaomi 18 Pro Max. Well-known tipster Digital Chat Station shared the information on Weibo. According to the tipster, the Xiaomi 18 Pro Max will pack a battery with a capacity exceeding 8,000mAh. Xiaomi 17 Pro Max The phone is also said to support 100W wired charging and wireless charging. Notably, the leak reiterates several previously rumored specifications, including a 2nm chipset, likely Qualcomm's upcoming Snapdragon...

title: Kuo: iPhone Ultra may have limited supply at launch and ship later
description: The iPhone Ultra, Apple’s foldable phone, is rumored to go official in September alongside the iPhone 18 Pro lineup. However, a new report suggests the foldable iPhone won't be available for pre-orders immediately after its unveiling, with shipments likely to begin at a later date. According to analyst Ming-Chi Kuo, the iPhone Ultra will be available in limited quantities at launch due to manufacturing challenges. As a result, pre-orders are expected to begin later than those for the iPhone 18 Pro and iPhone 18 Pro Max. Kuo says Apple could begin shipping the foldable iPhone in the...
